package rulecoverage

func NegativeBuilderWriteStringSingleByteLiteral() string {
    ruleID := "builder_write_string_single_byte_literal"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.Builder.WriteString(\"x\")` for single-byte literals instead of `WriteByte`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
